policies.resolution: Each listed alternative is a distinct permitted successor. A candidate must preserve the full successor set rather than choose one preferred outcome.
Concurrency means interleaving of atomic transitions, not simultaneous state updates. All permitted orders must be represented.
Priority defeat suppresses the lower-priority conclusion for the current state only. It does not delete, deactivate, or rewrite the defeated rule.
A Boolean value never substitutes for a required evidence record. Source and reliability are operationally relevant guard inputs.
T_modify changes exactly one rule from active to inactive, records before and after status, and may fire at most once.
Deadlock holds when no non-halt transition is admissible and both dispatch rules are inactive or blocked. T_halt is then admissible with terminal_reason=deadlock.
Histories record firing order and may differ across interleavings. Histories are not quotiented by commutativity.
A compiler must report partial or unsupported. It may not invent an unstated primitive meaning, derived operator, or unrestricted payload language.
